message:
fix(setup): handle single-quoted SSH config values and remove unwrap panics

- strip_inline_comment: rewrite to track active quote character (single
  or double) and honor backslash escaping inside double quotes only,
  fixing incorrect comment stripping for values like 'server#1.example.com'
- unpatch_shell_rc_at: replace unwrap on marker find with proper error
  return
- patch_wezterm_config_block_at: replace unwrap on marker find with
  proper error return

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
